creator: sa.inbox@gmail.com
text:
Link to the Web page with error: https://www.freebsd.org/community/mailinglists/ Error description: Link to "The English speaking mailing lists are listed in the FreeBSD Handbook." does not navigate to the mailing lists handbook section. Page contains the following html:

The English speaking mailing lists are listed in the FreeBSD Handbook.

Link "https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#eresources-mail" seems to be incorrect and should be replaced with "https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/eresources/#eresources-mail"
